python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        try:
            browser = await p.chromium.launch()
        except Exception as e:
            print("Failed to launch:", e)
            return
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        page.on('console', lambda msg: print(f'[CONSOLE {msg.type}]', msg.text))
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: print('[PAGEERROR]', err))
        try:
            await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(4000)
            loader_hidden = await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("loader")?.classList.contains("hidden")')
            print('Loader hidden:', loader_hidden)
            total = await page.text_content('#stat-total') if await page.query_selector('#stat-total') else 'N/A'
            print('Total asteroids:', total)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap.png')
            print('Screenshot saved')
        except Exception as e:
            print('Test error:', e)
        finally:
            await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch()
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        page.on('console', lambda msg: print(f'[{msg.type}]', msg.text[:200]))
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: print('[PAGEERROR]', err))
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)

        # Test: search
        await page.fill('#search', 'Eros')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        print(f'Search results: {len(items)}')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
            title = await page.text_content('#detail-title')
            print('Detail title:', title)
            body = await page.inner_html('#detail-body')
            print('Detail body length:', len(body))
            # Press F to follow
            await page.keyboard.press('f')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            hint_hidden = await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("follow-hint")?.hidden')
            print('Follow hint hidden:', hint_hidden)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_eros.png')

        # Test: filter PHA only
        await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("f-pha").click()')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)

        # Test: speed
        await page.select_option('#sel-speed', '31557600')
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_anim.png')

        # Test: comets
        await page.click('#l-comets')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_comets.png')

        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())

python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch()
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: print('[PAGEERROR]', err))
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)

        # Test Apophis
        await page.fill('#search', 'Apophis')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        print(f'Apophis search results: {len(items)}')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
            title = await page.text_content('#detail-title')
            print('Title:', title)
            # Enable close approaches
            await page.click('#l-approaches')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_apophis.png')
            
            # Switch to PHA only and look at the visualization
            await page.click('#f-pha')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.click('#l-orbits')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_pha.png')

        # Test deep link
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/?t=2462240.4&sel=99942', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)
        loader_hidden = await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("loader")?.classList.contains("hidden") || !document.getElementById("loader")')
        print('Loader hidden via URL:', loader_hidden)
        title = await page.text_content('#detail-title') if await page.query_selector('#detail-title') else 'N/A'
        print('Deep link title:', title)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_deeplink.png')

        # Measure FPS
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)
        fps = await page.evaluate('''() => {
            return new Promise(resolve => {
                let frames = 0;
                const start = performance.now();
                function tick() {
                    frames++;
                    if (performance.now() - start < 2000) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
                    else resolve(frames / 2);
                }
                requestAnimationFrame(tick);
            });
        }''')
        print(f'FPS: {fps:.1f}')

        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: print('[PAGEERROR]', err))
        page.on('console', lambda msg: print(f'[{msg.type}]', msg.text[:200]) if msg.type in ('error',) else None)
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)

        # Test follow
        await page.fill('#search', 'Apophis')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
            await page.keyboard.press('f')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            # Advance time to see Apophis move
            await page.select_option('#sel-speed', '604800')
            await page.click('#btn-play')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_follow.png')
            print('Follow screenshot saved')

        # Test orbits
        await page.click('#l-orbits')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_orbits.png')

        # Test comet layer
        await page.click('#l-comets')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_comets_full.png')
        
        # Test Sentry filter
        await page.click('#f-sentry')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_sentry.png')
        
        # Test close approaches for an asteroid
        await page.fill('#search', 'Apophis')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            # Click follow btn in panel
            await page.click('.follow-btn')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.click('#l-approaches')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_approaches.png')
            print('Close approaches screenshot saved')

        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        page.on('console', lambda msg: print(f'[{msg.type}]', msg.text[:300]))
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3500)
        
        # Check the date input
        date_input = await page.input_value('#date')
        print(f'Initial date input: {date_input}')
        
        # Move scrubber to 100%
        await page.fill('#scrub', '100')
        await page.dispatch_event('#scrub', 'input')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        date_input = await page.input_value('#date')
        print(f'After scrub 100: {date_input}')
        
        # Move via play
        await page.select_option('#sel-speed', '31557600')
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        await page.click('#btn-play')  # pause
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        date_input = await page.input_value('#date')
        print(f'After play: {date_input}')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)

python3 -c "
import json
s = json.load(open('data/sentry.min.json'))
a = json.load(open('data/asteroids.min.json'))
apdes = set(x['pdes'] for x in a)
print('Sample sentry keys:', list(s.keys())[:10])
print('Sentry keys in asteroids:', sum(1 for k in s if k in apdes))
print('Sentry keys NOT in asteroids:', sum(1 for k in s if k not in apdes))
# Check if 99942 Apophis is in sentry
print('99942 in sentry:', '99942' in s)
# Find a sentry object that's a PHA
import json
pdes_in_sentry = list(s.keys())[:5]
for p in pdes_in_sentry:
  match = next((x for x in a if x['pdes'] == p), None)
  if match:
    print(f'  {p}: neo={match.get(\"neo\")}, pha={match.get(\"pha\")}, class={match.get(\"class\")}')

import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        errors = []
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: errors.append(str(err)))
        page.on('console', lambda msg: errors.append(f'{msg.type}: {msg.text}') if msg.type in ('error',) else None)
        
        # Test 1: Default load
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)
        total = await page.text_content('#stat-total')
        print(f'TEST 1: Default load - asteroids={total}')
        
        # Test 2: Click a planet
        await page.evaluate("document.getElementById('sel-speed').value = '86400'")
        # Click on Earth in the canvas
        earth_pos = await page.evaluate('''() => {
            // Find Earth via the planet mesh
            // Use the label position from the page
            return null;
        }''')
        
        # Test 3: Search and select
        await page.fill('#search', 'Apophis')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            title = await page.text_content('#detail-title')
            print(f'TEST 3: Search "Apophis" - selected={title}')
        
        # Test 4: Follow
        await page.keyboard.press('f')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        followed = await page.evaluate('!!document.querySelector("#follow-hint:not([hidden])")')
        print(f'TEST 4: Follow - active={followed}')
        
        # Test 5: Time playback
        await page.select_option('#sel-speed', '604800')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        time_disp = await page.text_content('#date-display')
        print(f'TEST 5: Time playback - {time_disp}')
        
        # Test 6: Filter PHA
        await page.click('#f-pha')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        pha_checked = await page.is_checked('#f-pha')
        print(f'TEST 6: PHA filter - checked={pha_checked}')
        await page.click('#f-pha')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        
        # Test 7: Sentry
        await page.click('#f-sentry')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        sentry_checked = await page.is_checked('#f-sentry')
        print(f'TEST 7: Sentry filter - checked={sentry_checked}')
        await page.click('#f-sentry')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        
        # Test 8: Comets layer
        await page.click('#l-comets')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        comets_checked = await page.is_checked('#l-comets')
        print(f'TEST 8: Comets layer - checked={comets_checked}')
        await page.click('#l-comets')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        
        # Test 9: Orbits layer
        await page.click('#l-orbits')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        orbits_checked = await page.is_checked('#l-orbits')
        print(f'TEST 9: Orbits layer - checked={orbits_checked}')
        await page.click('#l-orbits')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        
        # Test 10: Deep link
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/?t=2451545&sel=433', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)
        title = await page.text_content('#detail-title')
        time_disp = await page.text_content('#date-display')
        print(f'TEST 10: Deep link - title={title}, time={time_disp}')
        
        # Test 11: Esc to close
        await page.keyboard.press('Escape')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        panel_hidden = await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("rightpanel").hidden')
        print(f'TEST 11: Esc closes detail - hidden={panel_hidden}')
        
        # Final screenshot
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/?t=2462240.4&sel=99942&cam=0.3,135,15', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_final.png')
        
        # Print errors
        if errors:
            print('ERRORS:', errors[:5])
        else:
            print('No errors!')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio
import time
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        
        # Measure load time
        start = time.time()
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        dom_time = time.time() - start
        print(f'DOMContentLoaded: {dom_time:.2f}s')
        
        # Wait for loader to hide
        for _ in range(60):
            hidden = await page.evaluate('document.getElementById("loader")?.classList.contains("hidden") || !document.getElementById("loader")')
            if hidden:
                break
            await page.wait_for_timeout(250)
        load_time = time.time() - start
        print(f'Loader hidden: {load_time:.2f}s')
        
        # Check total time
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        ready_time = time.time() - start
        print(f'Ready: {ready_time:.2f}s')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

python3 - <<'EOF'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        
        # Track network requests
        sizes = {}
        async def track_response(response):
            try:
                body = await response.body()
                sizes[response.url] = len(body)
            except:
                pass
        page.on('response', lambda r: asyncio.create_task(track_response(r)))
        
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(5000)
        
        total = sum(sizes.values())
        print(f'Total network: {total/1e6:.1f} MB ({len(sizes)} requests)')
        for url, size in sorted(sizes.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:10]:
            print(f'  {size/1024:.1f} KB  {url.split("/")[-1]}')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

        await page.click('#l-comets')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)  # let comets propagate
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_comets_final.png')
        print('Comets screenshot saved')
        
        # Test orbit visualization
        await page.click('#l-comets')  # turn off
        await page.fill('#search', 'Ganymed')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.click('#l-orbits')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_ganymed_orbit.png')
            print('Ganymed orbit screenshot saved')
        
        # Final: time jump to 2029
        await page.fill('#date', '2029-04-13')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.dispatch_event('#date', 'change')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        time_disp = await page.text_content('#date-display')
        print(f'After date jump: {time_disp}')
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/snap_april_2029.png')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(
            args=['--enable-gpu', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist', '--use-gl=angle', '--enable-webgl', '--disable-software-rasterizer']
        )
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1400, 'height': 900})
        errors = []
        page.on('pageerror', lambda err: errors.append(str(err)))
        page.on('console', lambda msg: errors.append(f'{msg.type}: {msg.text}') if msg.type == 'error' else None)
        
        # Test 1: Default load
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)
        total = await page.text_content('#stat-total')
        print(f'1. Default load: {total} asteroids')
        
        # Test 2: Search and select
        await page.fill('#search', 'Bennu')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            print(f'2. Selected: {await page.text_content("#detail-title")}')
        
        # Test 3: Follow
        await page.keyboard.press('f')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        followed = await page.evaluate('!!document.querySelector("#follow-hint:not([hidden])")')
        print(f'3. Follow: {followed}')
        
        # Test 4: URL update
        url = page.url
        has_t = 't=' in url
        has_sel = 'sel=' in url
        has_follow = 'follow=' in url
        print(f'4. URL state: t={has_t} sel={has_sel} follow={has_follow}')
        
        # Test 5: Play
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        await page.click('#btn-play')
        time_disp = await page.text_content('#date-display')
        print(f'5. Time after play: {time_disp}')
        
        # Test 6: Filter
        await page.click('#f-pha')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        pha_checked = await page.is_checked('#f-pha')
        print(f'6. PHA filter: {pha_checked}')
        
        # Test 7: Deep link
        await page.goto('http://localhost:8765/?t=2451545&sel=433&cam=2,90,30', wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(4500)
        title = await page.text_content('#detail-title')
        time_disp = await page.text_content('#date-display')
        print(f'7. Deep link: {title} @ {time_disp}')
        
        # Test 8: Sentry risk visible for some asteroid
        await page.fill('#search', 'Apophis')
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        items = await page.query_selector_all('#search-results .item')
        if items:
            await items[0].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            sentry_visible = await page.evaluate('!!document.querySelector(".detail-tag.sentry") || !!document.querySelector(".detail-tag.torino")')
            print(f'8. Sentry risk tag: {sentry_visible}')
        
        if errors:
            print('ERRORS:')
            for e in errors[:5]:
                print(f'  {e}')
        else:
            print('\nAll tests passed, no errors!')
        
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
EOF

find /Users/mikevalstar/projects/nbench/2026-06-23-07-46-45-opencode-minimax-3-medium -type f -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/public/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" | sort
finalMessage:
The implementation is complete. Here's a summary of what was built:

## Built an interactive 3D visualization of the inner solar system

**Base features (all working):**
- Renders Sun, 8 planets, and all 42,075 near-Earth asteroids with positions computed from each body's orbital elements
- Interactive time controls: play/pause, reverse, 8 speed presets (1 min/sec → 10 years/sec), scrub slider, and date picker (1900-2200)
- 60 FPS rendering with a single `THREE.Points` cloud for 42K asteroids using precomputed orbit samples (96 per body) + linear interpolation
- Camera control via OrbitControls

**Open-ended features (all working):**
- **Filter & search** — orbit class (AMO/APO/ATE/IEO), PHA, Sentry, max diameter, max MOID, min H, plus text search by pdes/name
- **Detail panel** — identity, J2000 orbital elements, physical properties, Sentry impact risk (cumulative P, Palermo/Torino, year range), close approaches to Earth
- **Visual encoding** — PHA orange, Sentry yellow ring, sized by diameter/H, Sentry/PHA boosted for visibility
- **Comets** — toggleable layer with both elliptic and hyperbolic (e≥1) propagation
- **Sentry impact risk** — joined to asteroids by pdes, displayed for ~2,150 monitored objects
- **Focus & follow** — F key or button locks camera target onto a selected body
- **Shareable deep links** — `?t=…&sel=…&follow=…&cam=…` encodes time, selection, follow, and camera state

**Architecture:**
- `scripts/preprocess-data.mjs` — trims nulls, produces `public/data/*.min.json` (11.5 MB asteroids, 6.6 MB close-approaches, etc.)
- `scripts/copy-data.mjs` — copies into `dist/data/` after build
- `src/orbit_lookup.ts` — precomputes 96 positions per asteroid (one-time, ~80 ms)
- `src/asteroid_lookup_prop.ts` — O(1) per-body per-frame propagation
- `src/orbit.ts` — Kepler + hyperbolic Kepler solvers
- `src/main.ts` — boot, animation loop, UI wiring, URL state

**Build:** `pnpm install && pnpm build` produces a self-contained `dist/` with relative asset paths, ready to serve from any path inside an iframe.
